string.text:
The AR57 carbine is a unique firearm renowned for its innovative design and functionality. This compact rifle combines elements of the AR-15 platform with a proprietary upper receiver chambered in 5.7x28mm caliber, originally developed for the FN P90 submachine gun. Featuring a distinctive top-mounted magazine feed, it offers increased capacity compared to traditional AR-style rifles while maintaining a lightweight and maneuverable profile. Its compatibility with standard AR-15 lower receivers ensures familiarity for users accustomed to the platform, while its efficient cartridge provides low recoil and excellent performance, making the AR57 carbine a versatile option for various shooting applications.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: Most optics for the Picatinny/weaver system.
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: 5.7x28mm suppressorn
